folio.label: 59v
folio.l: Who kepte hire , fro the drenchynge in the See
Who kepte Ionas , in the fysshes mawe
Til he was spouted vp / at Nynyuee
Wel may men knowe , it was no wygút but hee
That kepte peeple Ebrayk , fro here drenchynge
Witú drye feet / thurgú out the see passynge
¢ Who bad the foure spiritez / of tempest
That power han , to anoyen lond and see
Bothe Nortú and soutú , and also West and Est
Anoyetú neither see , ne lond ne tree
Sothely the comaundour / of that was he
That fro the tempest / ay this wo~man kepte
As wel whan she wook / as whan she slepte
¢ Where mygút this wo~man , mete & drynk haue
Thre ©er & more , how lastetú hire vetaille
Who fedde the egipciene Marye , in the caue
Or in desert / no wygút but crist saunz faille
Fyue thousand folk , it was as gret mäuaylle
Witú loues fyue , and fisshes two to fede
God sent his foysou~ , at here grete nede
¢ She dryuetú fortú , in to oure occeane
Thurgú out oure wylde see , til at the laste
Vnder an hold , that nempnen I ne can
Fer in Nortúhumberlond , the wawe hire caste
And in the sond , hire ship~ stiked so faste
That thens wold it nougút / of al a tyde
The wyl of criste was / that she shulde a byde

note.notetxt: 413There is a cross in dry point next to this stanza.ODR

folio.l: ¢ The Constable of the Castel , doun is fare
To sen this wrek / and al the ship~ he sougút
And fond this wery wo~man ful of care
He fond also , the tresor æ she brougút
In hire langage , mercy she bysougút
The lyf out of hire body / for to twynne
Hire to delyuere of woo / that she was Inne
¢ A maner latyn corupt / was hire speche
But algates ther by / was she vnderstonde
The Constable whan hi~ list / no lengere seche
This wooful wo~man , brougút he to the londe
She kneletú doun , and thanketú goddes sonde
But what she was , she wold noman say
For foule ne fayr , thougú that she shulde deye
¢ She seide she was / mased in the See
That she forgat / hir mynde be hire trouthe
The Constable hatú of hire / so gret pitee
And eke his wyf , that æei wepen for routhe
